landing.hero_desc: CardioScan uses advanced machine learning to analyze 13 clinical features and predict heart disease risk with 98.5% accuracy.
landing.no_card: No credit card required · Free forever · For educational use
landing.why_sub: Everything you need for cardiac risk assessment
landing.disclaimer_text: CardioScan is an educational ML project and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions.
landing.cta_sub: Create your free account and run your first prediction in under 2 minutes.

features.f1_desc: Logistic Regression, Random Forest & KNN work together for the most accurate prediction.
features.f2_desc: Get your heart disease risk score in under 2 seconds with full SHAP explainability.
features.f3_desc: Understand exactly which clinical factors are driving your risk — no black box.
features.f4_desc: Download professional clinical reports with patient data, risk score and feature analysis.
features.f5_desc: Adjust clinical values with sliders and see how your risk changes in real time.
features.f6_desc: Save every prediction and track risk trends over time with full history.

steps.s1_desc: Fill in 13 clinical features including age, cholesterol, blood pressure and ECG results.
steps.s2_desc: Select from Logistic Regression, Random Forest, or K-Nearest Neighbors classifier.
steps.s3_desc: Receive an instant risk score with probability percentage and risk level.
steps.s4_desc: Explore SHAP values to see exactly which features influenced the prediction.

auth.signin_sub: Sign in to your CardioScan account
auth.create_sub: Start predicting and tracking heart health
auth.forgot_sub: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

predict.title: Heart Disease
predict.subtitle: Enter patient clinical data below. The model analyzes 13 features using advanced ML algorithms.
predict.awaiting_sub: Fill in patient data and run the prediction to see results here.
predict.shap_desc: SHAP values — how each feature influenced this prediction

history.title: Patient
history.subtitle: All your saved predictions with full clinical data.
history.no_predictions_sub: Run a prediction on the Predict page and it will appear here automatically.
history.notes_placeholder: Add notes about this patient or prediction...
